attributes.description: Shakti Pumps (India) Ltd is primarily engaged in manufacturing of pumps and motors of various kinds. It also offers advanced water pumping solutions to a wide range of applications such as irrigation, horticulture, domestic water supply, commercial and industrial applications. Its brand "Shakti" is well received in the domestic and international markets.[1]
